macedonian-village-grass-pie-argiro.name: Macedonian Village Grass Pie

ingredients.item: 1 kg horts of sweets (spanach, lap, sesculus)
2 dry onions cut into thin slices
1 kg horts of sweets (spanach, lap, sesculus)
2 dry onions cut into thin slices

instructions: Remove the nettle from the freezer, and as long as it is half frozen, remove the nettle from the freezer.
Heat them in boiled salt water for a few minutes and drain them.
Heat 1/3 of the olive oil in a pot and at low heat, marinate the onions to become transparent.
Add the grasses and strengthen the fire. Salt and pepper.
To the end, add the fresh chopped onions and withdraw from the fire.
If the filling has not had a good drink, drain it into a colander and let it cool.
Place in a bowl and add the beaten eggs. Add the crushed cheese and pour with some olive oil.
Finally, we drop the herbs. Mix well.
We grease a shallow large pie pan. We spread radially 3 village leaves.
By oiling them in between, empty half the filling, spread a strained wrinkled leaf in between and spread the rest of the filling over.
We turn the edges inside onto the filling.
Cover the pie with two wrinkled leaves, oiling them in between. We're cutting into pieces.
Pour the trenches with the remaining olive oil and sprinkle with the fingers some water.
Bake in a well preheated evening at 180 Degrees C, resister for 30′ and then turn the evening into the lower residence. Continue baking for 30′ extra until the pie is browned and unstuck.

make-a-creamy-chicken-and-spinach-risott.name: Make A Creamy Chicken And Spinach Risotto
make-a-creamy-chicken-and-spinach-risott.original_name: Haz un cremoso risotto de pollo y espinacas
instructions: Ten todos los ingredientes listos antes de comenzar, especialmente el caldo de pollo que debe estar caliente para agregarlo al arroz poco a poco.
In a big frying pan, heat up a tablespoon of olive oil. Add the chicken into pieces and cook till it's golden everywhere. Withdraw and reserve.
In the same frying pan, add another tablespoon of olive oil and fry the onion and garlic finely minced until they are clear.
Add the rice to the frying pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, till the grains are slightly roasted.
Vierte el vino blanco y cocina hasta que se evapore casi por completo.

Add a tablespoon of hot stock to the rice and remove. He continues to add broth, a tablespoon at once, while waiting for the rice to absorb the liquid before adding more. That will take about 18-20 minutes.
When the rice is nearly to the dente, it incorporates the baked chicken and spinach. Cooking for a few more minutes till spinach fades and chicken's hot and hot.

Remove frying pan from the fire, add butter and parmesan cheese and gently remove till the risotto remains creamy. If you wish, add the milk cream for an extra soft texture. Reaping the date with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot risotto, decorated with a little more parmesan cheese grated if you prefer.

make-this-delicious-apple-and-yogurt-sna.name: Make This Delicious Apple And Yogurt Snack
make-this-delicious-apple-and-yogurt-sna.original_name: Haz este rico snack de manzana y yogurt
instructions: Start the recipe and get the apples. Peel and cut them into small cubes.
Calienta una cazuela y derrite la mantequilla, una vez lista incorpora la fruta.
Mix and add chewed sugar, cinnamon and pint of salt.
Deja cocinar por 5 minutos sin dejar de mover. La idea es que la manzana tome un buen sabor.
When you see that the apple's been a little doradite, turn off and let it stand till it's cold.
Take a bowl or cup and add some Greek yogurt, then apples, end with more yogurt and decorate with granola.
Refrigerate for 4 minutes and ready. Enjoy!

make-this-delicious-rigatoni-with-brocco.name: Make This Delicious Rigatoni With Broccoli And Sausage
make-this-delicious-rigatoni-with-brocco.original_name: Haz este delicioso rigatoni con brócoli y salchichas
instructions: Peel onion and cut into small cubes. Stretch his garlic teeth.
Cuece la pasta en agua con sal hasta que quede al dente. Sigue las instrucciones del empaque para ello.
Escurre la pasta y reserva.
In the same cooking water of the pasta, whitens the broccoli's pits for 3 minutes. Drain and reserve.
Cut the sausage into slices or scrape them.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and get some hot dogs for about 3 minutes.
Incorpora los dientes de ajo y la cebolla, mezcla y saltea por un par de minutos.
Vierte el vino blanco y desglasa el fondo. Deja que el alcohol se evapore.
Add the broccoli to the frying pan with some salt and pepper. Mix and cook for another 2 minutes.
Add the dough and mix with care to the frying pan until added with other ingredients.
Turn off and serve hot. He's with parmesan cheese.
Enjoy!

make-ahead-freezer-to-oven-chicken-packe.name: Make-ahead Freezer-to-oven Chicken Packets

ingredients.item: Packaged sliced boneless skinless chicken breast for stir-fry
Packaged sliced boneless skinless chicken breast for stir-fry

ingredients.prep: cut in half lengthwise, then into 1/4-inch-thick half-moons
cut in half, then sliced into thin half- moons

ingredients.item: Packaged sliced boneless skinless chicken breast for stir-fry

ingredients.prep: stemmed, cored, and cut into thin strips

ingredients.item: Up to 2 teaspoons hot red pepper sauce
Packaged sliced boneless skinless chicken breast for stir-fry

ingredients.prep: shredded through the large holes of a box grater

instructions: Mix all the ingredients in a very large bowl until the meat is well-coated in a uniform sauce.
Place a 12-inch piece of aluminum foil on your work surface; top with a 12-inch piece of parchment paper. Spoon a quarter of the chicken mixture into the middle of the parchment paper.

Fold the long sides so they meet in the middle of the packet, then crimp these long edges together to make a tight seal, using the foil to catch and hold the waggly parchment paper in the seam. Roll both of the ends of the packet to seal as well. continue to make 3 more packets.
Set the packets on a large baking sheet and freeze for at least 24 hours. Remove the sheet and stack the packets flat in the freezer.
To bake, position the rack in the center of the oven and heat the oven to 218°C.
Place 1 or more of the packets straight from the freezer on a large lipped baking sheet. Bake for about 30 minutes, or until hot and steamy inside. Cool for 10 minutes before opening and serving.

malted-chocolate-cake-with-namelaka-and-.name: Malted Chocolate Cake With Namelaka And Cherries

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. pitted fresh or frozen sweet dark cherries
Diamond crystal or morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Lightly coat two 8"-diameter cake pans with nonstick vegetable oil spray and line bottoms with parchment paper rounds. Whisk 1¾ cups (350 g) granulated sugar, 1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour, 1 cup (84 g) unsweetened cocoa powder, ½ cup (70 g) malted milk powder (if using), 2 tsp. baking soda, 1 tsp. baking powder, and ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl to combine. Whisk 2 large eggs, room temperature, 1 cup buttermilk, room temperature, ½ cup vegetable oil, 2 tsp. vanilla extract, and ½ tsp. almond extract in a medium bowl until smooth. Gradually add to dry ingredients, whisking until incorporated. Slowly add 1 cup hot coffee, whisking until smooth.

Divide batter between prepared pans (650 g with malt/620 g without malt). Bake cakes on middle rack, rotating front to back halfway through, until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 35–45 minutes. Transfer pans to a wire rack and let cakes cool in pans 30 minutes. Run an offset spatula around edges to loosen cakes, then turn out onto rack and carefully remove parchment paper; discard. Let cakes cool completely.
Do ahead: Cakes can be baked 3 days ahead. Wrap tightly in plastic and chill, or freeze up to 3 weeks.

Bring 1 lb. pitted fresh or frozen sweet dark cherries, ⅓ cup (67 g) sugar, 1 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, 1 tsp. cornstarch, and ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt to a boil in a medium saucepan, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring often and smashing cherries to break up slightly (you want jam to be chunky), until jam is uniformly bubbling, glossy, slightly darkened in color, and coats a spoon, 15–25 minutes. Remove pan from heat and stir in 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, and ¼ tsp. almond extract; let cool. (You should have about 1 cup jam.)
Do ahead: Jam can be made 3 weeks ahead. Transfer to an airtight container and chill, or freeze up to 6 months.
Pour 2 Tbsp. cold water (from the tap is fine) into a small bowl. Sprinkle 1 envelope unflavored powdered gelatin (about 2½ tsp.) evenly over. Let sit 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, place 9 oz. bittersweet chocolate, finely chopped, in a large bowl. Whisk 1 cup whole milk, ⅓ cup (47 g) malted milk powder (if using), and ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt in a medium saucepan to combine, then bring just to a steaming boil (not rolling) over medium heat, about 4 minutes.

Remove from heat, add gelatin mixture, and whisk until dissolved. Immediately pour through a fine-mesh sieve over chocolate and let sit 2 minutes, then whisk until chocolate is melted and mixture is smooth. Whisk in 1¾ cups chilled heavy cream. Cover namelaka with plastic wrap, pressing directly onto surface, and chill until set (it will be thickened and slightly jiggly, like chocolate pudding, at least 4 hours. (You should have about 4 cups.)

Using a serrated knife, trim off any domes on tops of cakes. Stir namelaka with a rubber spatula to loosen. Spread 1 Tbsp. namelaka in center of a cake stand or large plate (this will prevent cake from sliding around). Place 1 cake layer, right side up, on cake stand. Scoop 1 (heaping) cup namelaka on top and spread evenly with an offset spatula. Dollop two thirds of jam (about ⅔ cup) over namelaka and spread evenly (you can go all the way to the edges or leave a small border). Place second cake layer, cut side down, on top. Scoop 1 (heaping) cup namelaka on top and spread to edges, leaving smooth or swirling decoratively. Frost sides of cake with a thin layer of remaining namelaka (like a “naked cake”) or as thickly as you’d like; or reserve leftover namelaka for another use. Dot top of cake with more jam, swirling if desired. Chill cake uncovered until namelaka is set, at least 30 minutes.
Do ahead: Namelaka can be made 3 days ahead; keep chilled. Cake can be assembled 2 days ahead. Keep chilled (uncovered).

mania-cheese-pie-open-argiro.name: Mania Cheese Pie Open

ingredients.item: 400 gralley village or g.o.c. + a little extra for opening the leaf
1⁄4 cup olive oil + 1⁄4 cup. extra for baking
400 gralley village or g.o.c. + a little extra for opening the leaf
1⁄4 cup olive oil + 1⁄4 cup. extra for baking

instructions: In a bowl, add the flour, salt and olive oil and rub them with your hands until we have a mixture of wet sand texture.
Open a puddle in the center where we pour the vinegar and lukewarm water and mix with a spoon to form dough.
Empty the mixture and everything that is stuck in the bowl on the counter and work for 5-6 minutes with the hands until all the ingredients are absorbed and the dough sticks to the fingers.
Transfer the dough into a small bowl, cover it and allow it to rest for 40-60 minutes.

maple-chess-pie.name: Maple Chess Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Press the pie crust into the bottom and up the sides of a 9 inch deep dish pie plate.

In a medium bowl, beat the butter, sugar, and eggs until light and fluffy. Stir in the cornmeal, vinegar, and maple extract until well blended. Fold in pecans so they are evenly distributed. Pour into the unbaked pie crust.

Bake for 10 minutes in the preheated oven, then reduce the heat to 177°C (175 degrees C). Bake for 30 additional minutes, or until the top of the pie is golden brown, and the filling is set. When removing the pie from the oven, give it a gentle shake. If there is no movement, the pie is set. The pie will thicken and shrink slightly upon cooling.

marbled-mint-chocolate-pudding.name: Marbled Mint-chocolate Pudding
instructions: Place white chocolate and mint extract in a small bowl. Bring cream to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat.

Meanwhile, whisk salt into egg yolks in a medium bowl. Gradually whisk hot cream into egg mixture until incorporated. Return to saucepan; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until custard is thick enough to coat spoon, about 4 minutes. (Scrape bottom of saucepan while you stir to keep eggs from curdling.) Pour custard over white chocolate; let sit a minute or two. Stir until chocolate is melted and mixture is smooth.
Place chocolate in a small bowl. Bring cream and milk to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat.

Meanwhile, whisk sugar and salt into egg yolks in a medium bowl. Gradually whisk hot cream mixture into egg mixture until incorporated. Return to saucepan; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until custard is thick enough to coat spoon, about 4 minutes. (Scrape bottom of saucepan while you stir to keep eggs from curdling.) Pour custard over chocolate; let sit a minute or two. Stir until chocolate is melted and mixture is smooth.

Spoon a little chocolate custard into small glasses, then top with a little mint custard. Repeat layering until custard is evenly divided among glasses. Swirl with a skewer or the tip of a thin knife to marble, making sure to extend all the way to the sides of the glass. Let chill until cold, at least 2 hours.
Serve pudding topped with cookies.
DO AHEAD: Pudding can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

margherita-mug-eggs.name: Margherita Mug Eggs

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Brush the inside of a microwave-safe mug with butter.
Crack eggs into mug and top with ricotta cheese, tomatoes, and basil; season with salt, pepper, and oregano.
Cook in the microwave for 1 minute; stir and continue cooking in 15-second intervals, until set, about 1 minute more. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over eggs.

marinated-beans-with-celery-and-ricotta-.name: Marinated Beans With Celery And Ricotta Salata

ingredients.prep: navy beans, and/or black-eyed peas, rinsed

instructions: Toss beans, celery, oil, vinegar, and 1 Tbsp. thyme in a large bowl to combine; season generously with salt.
Just before serving, transfer beans to a shallow bowl and top with ricotta salata, pepper, and more thyme.
Do Ahead: Bean salad (without celery and ricotta salata) can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

marinated-radicchio-salad-with-orange-an.name: Marinated Radicchio Salad With Orange And Walnuts

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Using a paring knife, slice orange between membranes to release segments into a medium bowl; set aside. Squeeze orange membranes over a small bowl to release juices; measure 3 Tbsp. into a medium bowl (drink the rest!). Whisk in oil, vinegar, and orange zest; season with salt and pepper. Add shallot to vinaigrette and let sit for 5 minutes to soften. Add orange segments, radicchio, and parsley; toss to coat. Divide among plates and top each salad with walnuts.

marinated-short-ribs.name: Marinated Short Ribs
instructions: Prepare a grill for high indirect heat (for a gas grill, leave one or two burners off; for a charcoal grill, bank coals on one side); oil grate. Using a Microplane, finely grate lemongrass, chile (seeds and all!), garlic, and ginger into a medium bowl. (Alternatively, you can chop very finely, then mash to a paste using the side of your knife.) Add brown sugar, oil, fish sauce, and soy sauce and mix well.
Season ribs with salt and add to bowl. Turn as needed to coat completely. Let sit at least 10 minutes and up to 2 hours. (If marinating longer, wait to fire up the grill.)

Grill ribs over hottest part of grill, moving to cooler zone as needed if browning too fast, until well browned, about 5 minutes per side. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 10 minutes before slicing.
Transfer ribs to a platter and top with scallions and cilantro and sprinkle with sesame seeds. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

master-buttermilk-brine.name: Master Buttermilk Brine
instructions: Combine buttermilk, salt, and pepper in a large resealable plastic bag. Add chicken and chill at least 4 hours or overnight. Drain before using.
Add 4 teaspoons curry powder, 2 teaspoons ground cumin, and 2 teaspoons ground turmeric.
Add 2 tablespoons adobo sauce from a can of chipotle chiles in adobo.
Add 2 tablespoons smoked paprika, 2 tablespoons Tabasco, and 2 teaspoons celery seeds.
Add 2 thinly sliced lemons, 4 finely grated garlic cloves, and 2 cups chopped fresh dill.

meat-tortellini-with-tomato-sauce-telecu.name: Meat Tortellini With Tomato Sauce
meat-tortellini-with-tomato-sauce-telecu.original_name: Tortellini de carne com molho de tomate

ingredients.item: 50 g g g grated parmesan cheese

instructions: Descasque o alho e esmague-o. Passe o tomate por um passe-vite e reserve.

Light a pot with a thread of olive oil, let it warm, add the garlic and let it brown. Add the tomato, season with salt and some basil and let it cook, in low heat, stirring from time to time, until the sauce clears.
Boils the tortellini in abundant boiling water, seasoned with salt. Drain and wrap with tomato sauce and grated parmesan cheese. Add a few more basil leaves and serve.

mexican-chicken-wire-recipe-comedera.name: Mexican Chicken Wire Recipe
mexican-chicken-wire-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de alambre de pollo mexicano
instructions: Corta las pechugas de pollo en tiras.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Incorporates the english sauce, dusted garlic and some oregan. Meg and let go for about 20 minutes.
Pela la cebolla y retira las semillas y el centro de los pimientos. Corta en tiras las verduras.
Cut the bacon into strips or cubes and put a good hot frying pan into a frying pan until it's golden and the fat's been released.
Retract from frying pan and reserve.
In that same frying pan and in the fat that the pig loosed, pits the chicken strips till they are golden.
Agrega la cebolla y los pimientos, mezcla y cocina por unos 4 minutos hasta que suavicen un poco.
Rectifica de sal y apaga.
Add bacon and grated cheese, mix very well and you will be ready to enjoy.
Eat with the corn tortillas.

milkshake-the-jackie.name: Milkshake: The Jackie
instructions: In a blender, combine the milk, ice cream, and cookie crumbs. Blend on medium speed until fully combined, about 2 minutes.
Pour the shake into a pint glass and top with the sprinkles. Finish with a drizzle of chocolate sauce.
Enjoy!

milky-shaved-ice-with-strawberries.name: Milky Shaved Ice With Strawberries
instructions: If using a shaved ice machine, fill ice molds with whole milk and place on a level surface in freezer and freeze until solid, 4–6 hours.
If not using a shaved ice machine, pour whole milk into an 8" square metal baking pan and freeze until edges begin to set, 30–35 minutes.
Using a fork, scrape milk to break up frozen portions. Continue to freeze, scraping and breaking up every 20–30 minutes, until mixture resembles fluffy shaved ice, 2–4 hours.

Bring frozen strawberries and sugar to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium heat; simmer until saucy, 5–8 minutes. Remove from heat and crush berries with a potato masher or fork. Mix in lemon juice. Taste and add more lemon juice if needed. Chill strawberry sauce until cold, about 45 minutes.
If using shaved ice machine, remove frozen milk from freezer and let thaw 5 minutes. Place into machine and shave according to manufacturer’s directions.

To serve, place 1 Tbsp. condensed milk and 1 Tbsp. strawberry sauce into each glass. Spoon shaved ice over, dividing evenly. Top shaved ice with fresh strawberries and more strawberry sauce, then drizzle a little more condensed milk over.

mini-stuffed-peppers.name: Mini Stuffed Peppers

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Place pepper halves in a bowl. Add olive oil and salt; toss to combine.
Mix goat cheese, Parmesan cheese, jalapeño, garlic, chives, and black pepper together in a separate bowl until evenly combined. Spoon cheese mixture into pepper halves and place onto a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until peppers have softened and cheese is browned, about 15 minutes.

mint-ayran-lezzet.name: Mint Ayran
instructions: 1. Take a deep rough and deer from the blender.
2. Taze naneyi ekleyin.
3. Finally, add salt and water, and thoroughly foamed to rremove.
4. Take the service cups and add ice.
5. Cold service.
6.  Afiyet olsun.

misket-meatballs-stuffed-with-mozzarella.name: Misket Meatballs Stuffed With Mozzarella Cheese
instructions: 1. Ivy, panko pane mortar, egg, egg yolk, crushed garlic, onion powder, salt and pepper with a wide kneading container.
2. Prepare walnut size balls with your hands from your yogurt.
3. Round them from mozarella cheese balls.
4. The oily paper to an oven container is cool.
5. Pre-heated 180 degree bake about 20 minutes until the meatballs are over.
6. For sos, heat the olive oil in a saucepan.
7. Put your cube chopped onions and sparks until pink.
8. Add tomatoes, salt, pepper, thyme and pepper.
9. Bake in jealous fire for about 15 minutes until the sauce is obtained in the fire.
10. Add the fine chopped fresh fesle and get from the stove.
11. 11. Serve with the sauce that you prepare meatballs, with the leaves of fresh fesle.
12.  Afiyet olsun.
12. August Do not forget to browse the classic misket meatballs recipe, which will feast your stomach with flavor.

miso-red-curry-soup-dumpling-soup.name: Miso Red Curry Soup Dumpling Soup
instructions: In a hot pan on medium heat, sauté the garlic, shallots, and scallion until fragrant, about 1 minute.
To the pan add the broth, and bring it to a simmer, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the miso paste until melted and fully incorporated. Stir in the red curry paste until melted and fully incorporated. Season with soy sauce, fish sauce, and sugar.

Plop in the frozen soup dumplings and cover. Let simmer on medium heat for 10 minutes or until cooked through. Be sure to gently shake the pan about half way through the cooking time to ensure that the soup dumplings don't stick to the bottom of the pan.
Serve with scallions, sesame seeds, and extra chili oil!
Enjoy!

molletes.name: Molletes

ingredients.prep: bolillos, birotes, or other crusty rolls, halved lengthwise
pulled into strings, or monterey jack, coarsely grated

instructions:
Heat oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Add onions and cook, stirring, until just beginning to turn golden brown, 10–14 minutes. Stir in beans and add bay leaf. Cook, stirring occasionally, until beans begin to soften and fall apart, 9–11 minutes. Season beans with salt and remove from heat. Remove and discard bay leaf. Mash beans with a potato masher until smooth and spreadable.
Do Ahead: Beans can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.
Toss tomato, red onion, cilantro, jalapeño, and lime juice in a small bowl to combine; season with salt.

Heat broiler. Generously butter cut sides of rolls and place, buttered side up, on a rimmed baking sheet. Broil until butter is melted, about 1 minute. Remove from broiler; spread ⅓ cup refried beans over cut side of each roll half and arrange cheese down center. Broil until cheese is melted and beginning to brown, about 2 minutes.
Top each mollete with a fried egg, then pico de gallo, avocado, and pickled onion. Serve with hot sauce.

molten-lava-brownie.name: Molten Lava Brownie
instructions: In a large bowl, prepare the brownie mix.
Spray 2 ramekins with the cooking spray.
Place a spoonful of the brownie batter into each ramekin, then place two chocolate truffles in each dish.
Spoon more brownie batter over the top of the truffles, until the ramekin is about ¾-full. Smooth the batter evenly over the truffles.
Bake for 25 minutes, then cool for another 25 minutes.
On the serving plate, place the berries and the mint in a corner.
To ensure that the brownie comes loose, run a knife around the edges of each ramekin before inverting the dish onto the center of each plate.
Serve with ice cream and a drizzle of chocolate sauce.
Enjoy!

moorish-sardines-an-and-delicious-recipe.name: Moorish Sardines, An And Delicious Recipe
moorish-sardines-an-and-delicious-recipe.original_name: Sardinas a la moruna, una receta fácil y rica

ingredients.item: 50 ml  de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)

instructions: In a bowl, mix the cumin, pimenton, turmeric, ginger, ground cilantro and cinnamon (if used). Add lemon juice, minced garlic, salt and pepper. Baits the sardines with this mixture and leaves marinating for 30 minutes in the refrigerator.

In a large frying pan or mud pan, heat up olive oil and add onion. Cooking at medium heat till clear. Add the peppers and cook till they smooth slightly. Then add padded tomatoes and cook for 5-7 minutes, till the salsa pits a little.

Remove sardines from the marinade and put them carefully onto the vegetable bed in the saucer. Cover with a little more marinade if it remains and cover the casserole. Cooking at low heat for about 10-15 minutes, till the sardines are tender and well cooked but without getting rid of them.
Espolvorea perejil y cilantro fresco picado justo antes de servir para darle frescura al plato.

morgado-do-bussaco-teleculinaria.name: Morgado Do Bussaco
instructions: Prepare the cake: beat the clears in castle, until they are very firm, adding the sugar gradually. Add the nut kernel powder and wrap gently.

Uncategorize 6 leaves of vegetable paper with butter and distribute for them the previous preparation, forming circles of the same size. Then take it to the oven, preheated at 180oC, until it is cooked and crispy (about 20 minutes). Remove it from the oven and let it cool.
Prepare the egg candy: Lay the ingredients indicated in a pot. Take it to the fire, stirring until it thickens. Remove, go through a network pusher and book.
On a serving dish, alternately have pasta discs and egg candy, starting with the pasta and finishing with the candy. Decorate with coarsely chopped nut kernel and serve.

mozzarella-fritters-with-pesto-and-green.name: Mozzarella Fritters With Pesto And Greens

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. spring greens salad mix or other mixed greens

instructions: Whisk ½ cup all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 tsp. freshly ground black pepper in a medium bowl to combine. Place 2 large eggs in a shallow bowl and beat lightly to blend. Place 2 cups panko or coarse dried breadcrumbs in another shallow bowl.

Place 10 oz. spring greens salad mix or other mixed greens in a large bowl and evenly drizzle 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil over. Cut 1 lemon in half and squeeze juice over greens. Toss to coat, then season salad with salt and pepper.

Cut 8 oz. fresh mozzarella into eight ½"-thick slices. Working with 1 slice at a time, dredge mozzarella in seasoned flour, shaking off excess, then dip in eggs, letting excess drip back into bowl. Dredge in seasoned flour and dip in eggs a second time. Coat in panko, pressing gently to adhere before shaking off excess. Transfer coated mozzarella to a plate as you go.

Heat remaining 4 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium skillet over medium. Working in 2 batches, carefully place mozzarella slices in pan and cook, turning halfway through, until golden brown, 5–7 minutes total. Using tongs, carefully transfer mozzarella fritters to paper towels to drain.

Mound salad into shallow bowls or on small plates. Arrange mozzarella fritters on top. Cut remaining 1 lemon into wedges. Serve fritters with store-bought pesto, ciabatta or other crusty bread (if using), and lemon wedges for squeezing over.

mushroom-chicken-volovan-lezzet.name: Mushroom Chicken Volovan
instructions: 1. Taste is one of the most loved ones among recipes.
2. Round off with the help of mold or glass from a milföy pulp.
3. Take two with the help of mold from the two other two milföy pulp and place push in a row on round of the leg.
4. Put the yolk on the egg and cook in the oven with a set of 180 degrees.
5. Cook the back in the water and chop the little.
6. Sauce the mushrooms in the pan for a few minutes.
7. Observe Maydanosis.
8. Mix chicken, mushroom, mayonnaise and salt and share the middle of the volavans you extract from the oven.
9. Spread red flakes on it and make hot service.

mushroom-pie-with-puff-pastry-argiro.name: Mushroom Pie With Puff Pastry
instructions: For the puff pastry mushroom pie, we keep the puff pastry in the refrigerator frozen to make it very crispy in baking.
Clean the mushrooms and cut them into slices.
Heat anticolitic pot with a dick base and sauté the bacon to brown for 2 minutes and remove its aromas and fats.
Add the olive oil and as soon as it heats up, add the cleaned mushrooms. Sauté on high heat for 4-5′ without starring consistently.
The mushroom volume should fall to half and the mushrooms should drink their fluids. If necessary, add some olive oil and add the onions and garlic.
Sauté the onions for a few minutes.
Add the nutmeg, salt and pepper and sprinkle with the semolina.
Mix the ingredients to bake the semolina for a few minutes.
Add the milk and allow the filling to thicken for a few minutes. We're checking the salt and pepper.
Remove the cream from heat and allow it to cool and stabilise.
Add the caseri, parsley, nutmeg and parsley. Mix the ingredients.

mushroom-risotto-recipe-comedera.name: Mushroom Risotto Recipe
instructions: Calienta el caldo de res en el microondas o en la hornilla hasta que entibie.
Peel his teeth with garlic and steak. Also, pits onion and cuts into small notebooks.
Clean the mushrooms and cut into 4 portions.
Warm a pot with olive oil. It incorporates onion, garlic teeth, salt and pepper to taste. Mix and cook till soft and golden.
Add mushrooms and mix with onion and garlic.
It's time to add carnaroli and mix with other ingredients. Flow for 4 minutes.
Vierte la media taza de vino blanco, mezcla y cocina hasta que el alcohol se evapore.
Incorpora progresivamente el caldo de carne, cocina a fuego medio mientras vas mezclando hasta crear esa cremosidad.
Once the rice is creamy and soft, add butter and mix till melting.
Finally, add parmesan and blend cheese until everything's integrated. Turn it off and get ready.
Sirve y disfruta.

mushroom-farro-soup.name: Mushroom-farro Soup

ingredients.prep: shiitake, oyster, and/or maitake), cut into bite-size pieces
thinly sliced, plus any leaves coarsely chopped

instructions: Heat garlic and 3 Tbsp. oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium until oil around garlic is sizzling, about 1 minute. Add shallot and mushrooms, season with salt and pepper, and cook, stirring occasionally, until mushrooms are browned, 10–15 minutes. (Initially, pot will look dry, then very wet before mushrooms start to brown.)

Add Parmesan rind, farro, soy sauce, and 6 cups water to pot. Scrape up any browned bits stuck to bottom of pot, season with salt and pepper, and bring to a boil over medium-high. Reduce heat and simmer until farro is al dente, 15–20 minutes.
Add sliced celery to pot and simmer until slightly softened and bright green, about 3 minutes. Remove pot from heat; add lemon juice. Taste and season with salt and/or more soy sauce if needed.
Divide soup among bowls and top with finely grated Parmesan and celery leaves. Season with more pepper and drizzle with oil. Serve with bread alongside.

mysweetcreations-peanut-butter-cookie-pi.name: Mysweetcreations Peanut Butter Cookie Pie

ingredients.item: Cream-filled chocolate sandwich cookies (such as oreo®)

instructions: Preheat an oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Mix the chocolate cookies with the butter and cinnamon in a bowl. Press mixture firmly into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until the crust hardens, about 8 minutes. Set aside to cool.

Beat together the cream cheese, confectioners' sugar, and vanilla extract. Stir in the peanut butter until well blended, then fold in 3 cups whipped topping until the mixture is light and fluffy. Transfer the mixture onto the cooled cookie crust, spreading evenly on top.

Place the remaining 3/4 cup whipped topping into a pastry bag with a tip. Pipe the topping on the pie decoratively. Drizzle the chocolate and caramel syrups on top, and sprinkle with chopped peanut butter cups.

30-minute-sheet-pan-chicken-fajitas-fami.name: 30-minute Sheet Pan Chicken Fajitas - Family Meals
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C).
In a small bowl, combine the chili powder, smoked paprika, cumin, onion powder, garlic powder, oregano, and salt. Set aside.

In a large mixing bowl, toss the chicken strips, bell peppers, and onion with olive oil, minced garlic, lime juice, and adobo sauce. For extra heat, add a whole chipotle in adobo.  Sprinkle the spice mix over everything and toss again to coat evenly.

Spread the chicken and veggie mixture onto a sheet pan in an even layer. Roast for 15-20 minutes, stirring halfway through, until the chicken’s internal temperature reaches 165˚F (74˚C). For extra char, broil for 3-5 minutes.

While the fajitas are roasting, prepare the pico de gallo. In a bowl, combine diced tomatoes, onion, jalapeño (if using), cilantro, lime juice, salt, and garlic. Stir well and adjust seasoning to taste.

Once the fajitas are done, serve the chicken and veggies in warm tortillas, topped with cheese, sour cream, guacamole, and a spoonful of fresh pico de gallo. Don’t forget a squeeze of fresh lime for that perfect zing!
Enjoy!
